action.proof_term:
intro m hm
have h1 : (ArithmeticFunction.moebius * ArithmeticFunction.zeta : ArithmeticFunction ℝ) m = ∑ i ∈ m.divisors, (ArithmeticFunction.moebius i : ℝ) := ArithmeticFunction.coe_mul_zeta_apply
have h2 : (ArithmeticFunction.moebius * ArithmeticFunction.zeta : ArithmeticFunction ℝ) = 1 := ArithmeticFunction.coe_moebius_mul_coe_zeta
rw [h2, ArithmeticFunction.one_apply] at h1
exact h1.symm

intro m hm
have h1 : (ArithmeticFunction.moebius * ArithmeticFunction.zeta : ArithmeticFunction ℝ) m = ∑ i ∈ m.divisors, (ArithmeticFunction.moebius i : ℝ) := ArithmeticFunction.coe_mul_zeta_apply
have h2 : (ArithmeticFunction.moebius * ArithmeticFunction.zeta : ArithmeticFunction ℝ) = 1 := ArithmeticFunction.coe_moebius_mul_coe_zeta
rw [h2, ArithmeticFunction.one_apply] at h1
exact h1.symm

info.lean_statement: ∀ m : ℕ, 0 < m → ∑ e ∈ m.divisors, (ArithmeticFunction.moebius e : ℝ) = if m = 1 then 1 else 0

verification_layers.policy: Per-layer verification status is additive metadata: a kernel-verified root theorem does not imply every layer is verified, and layer completeness never gates certification.
